ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media title */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., Movie, TV Show) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the media was added to the platform */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the media */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the media */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media (e.g., 2h 30m) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the media */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer for the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_countries" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_genres" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_directors" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_actors" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., watch, rate) */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Time the user spent watching the show (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production team */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the production team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Lead of the production team */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_teams_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production team */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., producer, director, writer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the external service */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the external service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the external service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "service_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each media title
Type of media (e.g., Movie, TV Show)
Date the media was added to the platform
Country of origin for the media
URL of the trailer for the media
Region of the country (e.g., North America, Europe)
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content manager, analyst)
Time the user spent watching the show (in minutes)

Role of the team member (e.g., producer, director, writer)
Unique identifier for each team member
